sn2.20:1.0.1: Standing to one side, the young deva Anāthapiṇḍika recited these verses in the presence of the Blessed One:
sn2.20:1.0.2: v.312"This indeed is that Jeta's Grove,The resort of the Order of seers,Dwelt in by the Dhamma King,A place that gives me joy.
sn2.20:1.0.3: v.313"Action, knowledge, righteousness,Virtue, an excellent life:By this are mortals purified,Not by clan or wealth.
sn2.20:1.0.4: v.314"Therefore a person who is wise,Out of regard for his own good,sn.i.56Should carefully examine the Dhamma:Thus he is purified in it.
sn2.20:1.0.5: v.315"Sāriputta truly is endowed with wisdom,With virtue and with inner peace.Even a bhikkhu who has gone beyondAt best can only equal him."
sn2.20:1.0.6: This is what the young deva Anāthapiṇḍika said. Having said this, he paid homage to the Blessed One and, keeping him on the right, he disappeared right there.
sn2.20:1.0.7: Then, when the night had passed, the Blessed One addressed the bhikkhus thus: "Bhikkhus, last night, when the night had advanced, a certain young deva … approached me … and in my presence recited these verses:
sn2.20:1.0.8: "This indeed is that Jeta's Grove,The resort of the Order of seers,Dwelt in by the Dhamma King,A place that gives me joy.
sn2.20:1.0.9: "Action, knowledge, righteousness,Virtue, an excellent life:By this are mortals purified,Not by clan or wealth.
sn2.20:1.0.10: "Therefore a person who is wise,Out of regard for his own good,Should carefully examine the Dhamma:Thus he is purified in it.
sn2.20:1.0.11: "Sāriputta truly is endowed with wisdom,With virtue and with inner peace.Even a bhikkhu who has gone beyondAt best can only equal him."
sn2.20:1.0.12: "This is what that young deva said. Having said this, he paid homage to me and, keeping me on the right, he disappeared right there."
sn2.20:1.0.13: When this was said, the Venerable Ānanda said to the Blessed One: "Venerable sir, that young deva must surely have been Anāthapiṇḍika. For Anāthapiṇḍika the householder had full confidence in the Venerable Sāriputta."
